pixie_dust_potion.name: Pixie Dust Potion
pixie_dust_potion.description: A glowing pink vial that smells like strawberries. Heals a small amount of HP (20%) during or after a battle.

brambleberries.name: Brambleberries
brambleberries.description: Sweet, thorny blue berries found in the outer woods. Boosts your beast's happiness. A reliable daily treat.

gnome_grown_carrots.name: Gnome-Grown Carrots
gnome_grown_carrots.description: Crunchy, earthy vegetables. Feeding this to a beast gives a tiny, flat EXP boost.

aether_tonic.name: Aether Tonic
aether_tonic.description: A swirling silver liquid that clears the mind. Instantly cures any status condition.

luna_nectar.name: Luna Nectar
luna_nectar.description: Liquid moonlight captured in a crystal flask. Restores 100% of a beast's mana/energy.

star_candy_shards.name: Star-Candy Shards
star_candy_shards.description: Crunchy, glowing candy that tastes like popping rocks. Permanently increases one specific base stat by a small amount.

spellbound_incense.name: Spellbound Incense
spellbound_incense.description: Smells of ancient lavender and ozone. Increases the encounter rate of Uncommon and Rare wild beasts for 30 minutes.

phoenix_elixir.name: Phoenix Elixir
phoenix_elixir.description: A warm, glowing red potion that bubbles fiercely. Revives a knocked-out ChibiBeast and restores it to 50% HP.

chrono_biscuit.name: Chrono-Biscuit
chrono_biscuit.description: A clock-shaped cookie that tastes like cinnamon. Instantly completes any passive training or exploration task.

ambrosia_tart.name: Ambrosia Tart
ambrosia_tart.description: The literal food of the gods, shimmering with a golden aura. Maxes out happiness and permanently grants +5% damage multiplier.

genesis_fruit.name: Genesis Fruit
genesis_fruit.description: A fruit that shifts through every color of the rainbow. Triggers the Ascended form of certain beasts — a divine transformation that cannot be undone. The beast that steps through does not come back the same. Nothing that touches the Genesis Fruit does.

epoch_shard.name: Epoch Shard
epoch_shard.description: A sliver of time that predates the clock. It ticks backwards. Looking at it too long makes recent memories feel distant.
epoch_shard.lore: The Loom shed this when it first tried to weave time and got it slightly wrong. Chronos kept the original. This is what fell.

firstborn_ember.name: Firstborn Ember
firstborn_ember.description: A flame that has been burning since before fire had a name. It does not consume what it touches. It simply reminds it that it exists.
firstborn_ember.lore: Genesis shed this on the day everything began. It has been looking for an altar ever since.

void_prism.name: Void Prism
void_prism.description: A crystal that absorbs all light that enters it. Nothing comes out. The silence around it is a different kind of silence than normal silence.
void_prism.lore: The Abyss leaves these behind sometimes. It does not explain why. It does not explain anything.

forge_ember.name: Forge Ember
forge_ember.description: A coal that hasn't stopped burning since the Sunforge last fired. It doesn't burn things — it clarifies them.
forge_ember.lore: Goblins who handle these too long start hitting harder. No one has studied why. No one really wants to.

void_shard.name: Void Shard
void_shard.description: A splinter of something that predates shadow. Light doesn't reflect off it — it disappears into it.
void_shard.lore: Found only in places where the Abyss has been present long enough to leave something behind. The Loom has noted its locations. The Loom has not shared them.

spirit_lantern.name: Spirit Lantern
spirit_lantern.description: A lantern that lights itself when a Kitsune is near. The flame is the color of fox fire, which is to say it is several colors at once.
spirit_lantern.lore: Kitsune spirits have been leaving these behind for centuries. They never explain why. The explanation is probably that they knew.

abyssal_scale.name: Abyssal Scale
abyssal_scale.description: Shed from something vast and patient in corrupted water. Still faintly wet, though it has no reason to be.
abyssal_scale.lore: The Corrupted Leviathan doesn't shed scales — except once, and only for a Hydra it has decided deserves to become more than it is.

ironbark_salve.name: Ironbark Salve
ironbark_salve.description: A thick resin from enchanted bark, hardened by gnome-iron dust. Temporarily reinforces a beast's hide before battle.

quicksilver_tonic.name: Quicksilver Tonic
quicksilver_tonic.description: A shimmering liquid that makes a beast feel like it left before it arrived. Boosts speed significantly for one battle.
